name: Nihon Nohyaku Co., Ltd.
summary: Nihon Nohyaku Co., Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, import, export, and sale of agrochemicals in Japan and internationally. It offers fungicides, insecticides, and herbicides. The company also offers chemical products for use in home gardening, greenery, and termite applications. In addition, it provides pharmaceuticals and animal health products, including topical anti-fungal agents, such as drugs for athlete's foot, as well as sprays for cow liver illness and fat necrosis treatment, and tick repellents for bees; antibacterial feed additives, pig and chicken growth promotion products, and products for feed efficacy improvement; wood preservatives, industrial chemicals, and other agricultural materials; and landscape work, agrochemical residue analysis, and real estate rental services. The company was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
